subcodes.first_line: The servant hath been honored by thy letter, from whose horizon hath shone forth, unveiled, the sun of the love of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد تشرف الخادم بکتاب حضرتک الذی لاحت من افقه شمس محبه الله من غیر ستر تحجب
subcodes.subjects: @methods of teaching the Cause, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @wisdom [hikmat], @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings
